title: CLI Dashboard Implementation
purpose: Implement the CLI runtime dashboard that aggregates data from telemetry, events, state files, and audit logs into a unified operational view.
architectural_constraints: Must not bypass governance event bus
Must use storage adapter for all reads
Must support filtering by severity, category, execution_id
acceptance_criteria: Updates in near-real-time (< 30s for critical metrics)
Filtering by severity, category, execution_id works
Degraded states handled gracefully (stale data warnings)
Dashboard does not impact runtime performance > 5% CPU
